hero.headline: See Wild Dolphins & Manatees Up Close in Melbourne, Florida
hero.subheadline: Family-friendly boat tours with a local captain, beautiful wildlife, and unforgettable views on the Indian River Lagoon.

whyChoose.title: Real Florida Wildlife
whyChoose.text: Cruise the Indian River Lagoon and look for dolphins, manatees, pelicans, ospreys, and other coastal wildlife.

whyChoose.title: Easy Family Adventure
whyChoose.text: A simple, relaxed experience for kids, parents, grandparents, and out-of-town visitors.

whyChoose.title: Local Knowledge
whyChoose.text: Enjoy the river with a captain who knows the water, the wildlife, and the best places to explore.

reviews.quote: Amazing experience on the water. We saw dolphins and had a great time with the family.
reviews.name: Recent Guest

reviews.quote: Captain Bob made the tour fun, easy, and memorable. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Melbourne.
reviews.name: Tour Guest

reviews.quote: Beautiful views, relaxed ride, and lots of wildlife. Perfect Florida day.
reviews.name: Happy Customer

faq.question: Where do tours depart from?
faq.answer: Tours depart from the Melbourne, Florida area on the Indian River Lagoon. Add the exact dock address in the JSON file once confirmed.

faq.question: Will we definitely see dolphins?
faq.answer: Dolphins are wild animals, so sightings cannot be guaranteed, but the tour is designed around known local wildlife areas.

faq.question: Can kids come?
faq.answer: Yes. This is designed as a family-friendly tour for all ages.

faq.question: What should we bring?
faq.answer: Sunscreen, sunglasses, water, comfortable clothes, and a camera are recommended.
